anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the resolved organ mechanism supplies public synthetic process, redaction, digest, negative-case, and receipt evidence for bounded instance repair.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the resolved organ mechanism supplies public synthetic process, redaction, digest, negative-case, and receipt evidence for bounded instance repair.

statement: Microcosm Tool Server Pressure Inventory Refine Instance
title: Microcosm Tool Server Pressure Inventory Refine Instance
triggers: A tool-server pressure inventory instance has stale or weak synthetic fixture refs, redaction findings, source-module digests, negative cases, receipts, or claim-ceiling language.
The correction can stay within public synthetic process fixtures and body-free receipts without acquiring live process authority.
workflow: Inspect the standard, organ atlas row, runtime source locus, exported bundle, source-module manifest, mechanism evidence, receipts, generated health, and authority boundary before mutation.
Change only fields that tighten fixture refs, digest checks, redaction checks, validator binding, receipt expectations, negative cases, authority ceiling, or anti-claim wording.
Regenerate projections and preserve live process reads, host mutation, provider calls, release, private equivalence, and whole-system correctness as residual pressure.
